3135170.name: Orbit Puzzle
3135170.description: "Orbit Puzzle" is a puzzle game that lets you unravel the mysteries of ancient astronomy! Analyze the complex orbit of a given celestial body and accurately determine the rotational speed and radius of both the deferent and epicycle. Understand the geometric principles of epicycles and complete the path of the celestial body. Each level presents more challenging orbits, testing your logical thinking and problem-solving skills. Embark on an exciting journey to uncover the secrets of the universe from the perspective of an ancient astronomer!
